record.field: Get unlimited POS devices in your plan. Sell online and in stores using barcodes, serial numbers, and categories, with full integration with inventory, accounting, and CRM.
Create professional invoices and quotes, and set custom statuses for each to facilitate tracking, boost productivity, and ensure compliance.
Number of new customers you can add based on your plan.
Manage your warehouses in different locations from one platform to improve inventory distribution and speed up supply.
